center.name: 刚果盆地
center.summary: 刚果盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括剛果孔雀、Gabon coucal、Congo pied hornbill等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Congo pied hornbill (Lophoceros fasciatus) is a bird of the hornbill family, a family of tropical near-passerine birds found in the Old World. The Congo pied hornbill is native to the Congo Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dark chanting goshawk breeds in sub-Saharan Africa, but avoids the rainforests of the Congo Basin and the far south, where it is replaced by the pale chanting goshawk and east Africa where the eastern chanting goshawk seems to replace it. There are five currently recognised subspecies, *Melierax metabates metabates: Senegal and the Gambia east to Ethiopia, south to the Democratic Republic of the Congo and northern Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Congo Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly found in Gabon but also occurs in neighboring areas of Cameroon, Angola, the Central African Republic, the western Congo Basin and Equatorial Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Ituri batis occurs in the eastern Congo Basin in Ituri and Itombwe in the north eastern Democratic Republic of Congo where it is uncommon and in the Budongo Forest in western Uganda where it is common. The Ituri batis is found in lowland forest, between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in western Central Africa as well as in the Albertine Rift montane forests and northern adjacent areas of Kenya, Uganda and the eastern Congo Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2022 |title=Afropavo congensis |volume=2022 |article-number=e.T22679430A208189646 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2022-1.RLTS.T22679430A208189646.en |access-date=27 November 2025}} | genus = Afropavo | parent_authority = Chapin, 1936 | display_parents = 2 | species = congensis | authority = Chapin, 1936 }} The Congo peafowl (Afropavo congensis), also known as the African peafowl or mbulu by the Bakôngo, is a species native to the Congo Basin.{{cite book |last1=Dowsett |first1=R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-chested swallow (Hirundo lucida) is a small non-migratory passerine bird found in West Africa, the Congo Basin and Ethiopia
